pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

src/main/java/ch/salon/config/WebConfigu.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/ch/salon/config/WebConfigu.why_exists: Paths.get() is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and Path.of() is the recommended replacement.

src/main/java/ch/salon/domain/Authority..general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/ch/salon/domain/Authority..why_exists: Java 21 enforces stricter serialization checks; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/ch/salon/domain/Authority..general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/ch/salon/domain/Authority..why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/ch/salon/service/EmailAlre.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/ch/salon/service/EmailAlre.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler settings (e.g., -Werror or specific module path checks).

src/main/java/ch/salon/service/EmailAlre.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/ch/salon/service/EmailAlre.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, leading to a compile error.

src/main/java/ch/salon/service/InvalidPa.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/ch/salon/service/InvalidPa.why_exists: Java 21 enforces stricter serialization checks; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern JDKs.

src/main/java/ch/salon/service/InvalidPa.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/ch/salon/service/InvalidPa.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is in java.io package; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/ch/salon/service/dto/Admin.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/ch/salon/service/dto/Admin.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/ch/salon/web/rest/errors/I.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/ch/salon/web/rest/errors/I.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/ch/salon/web/rest/errors/I.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/ch/salon/web/rest/errors/I.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/ch/salon/web/rest/errors/L.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/ch/salon/web/rest/errors/L.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile with the new --enable-preview or strict serialization checks enabled in JDK 21 toolchains.

src/main/java/ch/salon/web/rest/errors/L.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
